shortdescription: Global financial markets swing as investors react to Iran tensions and disruptions in the Strait of Hormuz.
description: Global markets remain volatile as tensions involving Iran and disruptions in the Strait of Hormuz push oil prices higher and fuel fears of inflation and supply shortages.
author: Mark Blaze
title: Oil Prices Surge Amid Iran Tensions and Hormuz Shipping Disruptions
Millennials Face $1.2 Trillion Retirement Savings Gap – Average 401(k) Balance Below $50K
shortdescription: Generation Y enters 40s with lowest retirement savings in history – 73% behind Gen X at same age.
description: Average millennial 401(k) balance just $47,000 vs $65,000 for Gen X – inflation and student debt compound crisis.
author: Mark Blaze

title: Robo-Advisors Overtake Traditional Financial Advisors – Fees Drop 70% Since 2020
shortdescription: AI-powered investment management manages $2.1 trillion as human advisors struggle to compete with 0.15% fees.
description: Traditional advisors charge 1.0-1.5% while robo-advisors offer 0.15-0.25% – 70% fee reduction since 2020 revolutionizes wealth management.
author: Mark Blaze

title: Meme Stock Mania Returns in 2025 – Retail Traders Pile $50B into GameStop, AMC, and Beyond
shortdescription: Retail investors drive $50B into meme stocks as social media speculation reaches new heights.
description: GameStop, AMC, and other meme stocks see renewed activity as retail traders deploy $50B in speculative plays.
author: Mark Blaze
